ValidationRule.description: 'Quarter' field is required for CSA Record Type and SLG Request type.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName ='Solution_Implementation', ISBLANK( TEXT(Quarter__c )), ISBLANK( TEXT( Year__c )), ISPICKVAL(Request_Type__c ,'SLG'), OR( NOT(ISBLANK( Kick_Off_Call__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Group_Training_Sessions__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Group_Steering_Sessions__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Usage_Analysis_Optimization__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( On_Site_Workshop__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( API_Google_Sheets_Training__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Client_Meeting__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Training_Summary__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Email_Support__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Product_Customization__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Dedicated_Training_Sessions__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( QBR__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Mini_Deck__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Insight_Email__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Deck__c )) ) )
